allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('score:', j.score, '\\ntasks:', j.total_tasks, '\\nlacunas:', j.lacunas?.length\)")
